# Order Items

Operations related to order items. Order items are the individual line items within orders.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/order-items` | Create order item. | Bearer token required |
| `DELETE` | `/order-items/{order_item_id}` | Delete order item. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/order-items/{order_item_id}` | Get order item. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/order-items/{order_item_id}` | Update order item. | Bearer token required |

## `POST /order-items`

Create order item.

Create order item.

- Authentication: Bearer token required
